content.en:
As soon as Ye Tian entered the Underworld Heaven and Earth, he immediately began to attack the Underworld Alliance that was guarding this gate.

Although he forcibly shuttled through the first-order gate, he was counterattacked, and he was injured by the rules, and his strength was not lost well, but his strength was still extremely terrifying, far exceeding the ordinary third-level supreme powerhouse, so he easily destroyed the Pluto Alliance and killed the strongest of the Pluto Alliance.

Subsequently, Ye Tian began to refine this gate, turning it into his own gate, and then creating a base in the Immortal Heaven and Earth.

In this way, even if the catastrophe of the Immortal Heaven and Earth had passed, he could still send a Terran powerhouse to guard this base, and he would not let this first-order gate be snatched back.

After doing all this, Ye Tian began to absorb the refining power and refine his physical body.

He is now the strongest person in the Flesh Body Five Tribulation Realm, this time the goal is not high, he only needs to be promoted to the Flesh Body Six Tribulation Realm, after all, after the Flesh Body Five Tribulation Realm, it is extremely difficult to ascend to each Tribulation Realm, and the calamity power and time required are far from comparable before.

Therefore, he didn't expect him to be able to raise his strength to the Seven Tribulations Realm of the Flesh at all.

Time passed slowly, and in the blink of an eye, the catastrophe of the Immortal Heaven and Earth reached the late stage.

this day.

Ye Tian finally refined his physical body to a new limit and ushered in the sixth physical body tribulation.

Bang!!!!

After Ye Tian's physical body was destroyed and restored again and again, he survived the most terrifying thunder tribulation, and finally completed the qualitative change and stepped into the realm of the six tribulations of the physical body.

"This time the crossing was quite easy, only slightly injured, it seems that I am still far from the limit!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

There is a limit for anyone, and many people have insufficient foundations, and they can't even become the Five Tribulations of the Flesh Realm, and if they forcibly break through, they will only die.

Therefore, no matter how powerful the force is, no matter how many resources it has, no matter how much time it has, once it reaches its limit, it will not be able to continue to survive the physical tribulation.

For example, most of the invincible people were only in the Flesh Body Five Tribulation Realm at the beginning, and they didn't dare to try to cross the Flesh Body Six Tribulation Realm at all, because the Flesh Body Five Tribulation Realm was their limit.

But it was not difficult for Ye Tian to survive the sixth physical body tribulation, so he could continue to use the tribulation power to refine the physical body.

Next, Ye Tian cultivated in the Underworld for another period of time, until the catastrophe of the Underworld was about to pass, and then he left the Underworld World, and this base of the Underworld Heaven and Earth, Ye Tian also sent some ancestors of the human race to guard it.

After all, the Immortal Heaven and Earth suffered heavy losses in this catastrophe, and he also killed many of the strongest people, where would he dare to deal with the base of the human race!

Therefore, it is enough to send some Ancestors to guard it.

---------------

Time flies.

Five dark passages have passed in the Dark Forbidden Domain, and Ye Tian has entered many exotic worlds, even another catastrophe in the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth, he has also passed once, with the help of the tribulation power of these exotic worlds, he continues to refine his physical body.

But the more he went to the back, the more difficult it became to refine his physical body, so he also perfected his secret technique of transforming the tribulation many times, but a great tribulation in an exotic world could not improve his realm of one calamity.

Now, using the tribulation power of many great tribulations, he has barely raised his realm to the realm of the Seven Tribulations of the Flesh, and his strength is much stronger than before.

In terms of true combat effectiveness, he is definitely not weaker than the average invincible ancestor.

It was too difficult to advance from the Seven Tribulations of the Flesh Body Realm to the Eight Tribulations of the Flesh Body, he had already been to two exotic worlds, and he had not yet raised his strength to the Eight Tribulations of the Flesh Realm.

Obviously, it is too difficult to use the pure tribulation power to improve the strength to the Eight Tribulations of the Flesh Body.

"If I can get the Blood Tribulation, maybe I can improve my cultivation faster!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After all, it is very difficult for ordinary supreme beings to absorb the power of robbery, they can only rely on blood robbery, which shows the value of blood robbery, even if it is the blood of a robbery beast, maybe it can directly make him rise from the Seven Tribulation Realm of the Flesh Body to the Eight Tribulation Realm of the Flesh Body.

"It's a pity that the original blood robbery!"

Ye Tian couldn't help but sigh.

However, if he was given another choice, he would still choose to use the Blood Tribulation to trade the construction method of the Second Order Gate and the secret knowledge of the Invincible Person, otherwise he would not know how to impact the Invincible Ancestor and where he could improve to the strength of the Seven Tribulations Realm of the Flesh Body now.

But the question now is how to get another Raider.

The strength of the robbery beast is very strong, and the robbery beast is comparable to the weaker invincible ancestor, if it is a robbery beast of the second or third tribulation, I am afraid that even the invincible ancestor will not dare to provoke the other party, otherwise it will be looking for death.

Any destruction of the world in an exotic land will give birth to a beast of calamity.

Maybe there are Tribulation Beasts in the Sanctuary Heaven and Earth, but it may not be a Tribulation Beast, or it may have been killed.

However, many exotic worlds have experienced the destruction of exotic worlds many times, in that case, if the beast is not killed, it will be absolutely terrifying, and even the super-famous forces will not dare to provoke such a beast, otherwise they will be looking for death.

The reason why the Dark Forbidden Domain is targeted is because the Dark Forbidden Domain has only experienced the destruction of the Exotic Heaven and Earth once, and that robber beast is just a robber beast, and the six super-name forces know this information, so they dare to attack the idea of the robber beast, otherwise they will not dare to attack the robber beast if they have ten dares!

......

Dark Forbidden Realm.

Today's human race has more than thousands of ancestors, and its strength can be described as extremely powerful, and the clansmen are all over the entire dark forbidden domain, and other forces have a little room to survive in the battle gate, and other forces have no room to survive at all.

At the same time, there were very few forbidden places in the Dark Forbidden Domain, there were dozens of forbidden places before, but now there are only a dozen forbidden places left, including the base forbidden places of the six super-famous forces.

This was naturally Ye Tian's sake, which caused many foreign forces to give up the Dark Forbidden Realm one after another.

This is a good thing, at least in the future, the Dark Forbidden Realm will not be invaded by multiple foreign forces.

Once the Dark Forbidden Realm does not have the door of any foreign forces, the Terrans can completely control the entire Dark Forbidden Domain, and they can invade other foreign worlds with all their might.

"It's time for a showdown with the six super-name-level forces, at least trade some knowledge or resources, no matter how bad it is, you have to destroy their second-order gates!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the forbidden land of the Illusory Dream Realm, a super-name-level force, and he wanted to capture the members of the Illusory Dream Realm, so as to negotiate with the Illusory Dream Realm, otherwise he would not have anything good to trade with a super-name-level force.

As for whether he would offend the Illusory Dream Realm, he didn't care.
